name: Strawberry Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine strawberry fruit spread with warm water (optional).
2. Do not use reduced-calorie sour cream.
3. Preheat oven to 325°F.
4. Beat softened cream cheese until creamy in a large bowl.
5. Blend in pourable fruit, vanilla, and salt.
6. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
7. Pour mixture into greased 9-inch springform pan.
8. Bake for 50 minutes.
9. Mix sour cream with vanilla.
10. Carefully spoon over warm cheesecake.
11. Bake another 10 minutes, or until just set.
12. Turn off oven; leave cheesecake in oven with door closed for 30 minutes.
13. Transfer to wire rack; loosen cheesecake from rim of pan.
14. Cool overnight.
15. Garnish with sliced strawberries before serving.
